calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-18-2009 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2009 Continued To Jun-01-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-09-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Sydney E. Fairbairn, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Clear Channel Radio.
Annette Tarabini, Business Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Lars Roner.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Roar Advertising Corporation was filed today, April 9, 2009.
Default was entered against defendant Lars Roner on April 30, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on April 30, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Clear Channel Radio, and against the Defaulted Defendant Lars Roner as follows:

Damages/Principal - $31,904.75.
Prejudgment Interest - $8,238.80.
Attorney's Fees - $800.00.
Costs - $469.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $41,412.55.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2009 Continued To Apr-20-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to 4/20/2009 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Karen Farnsworth, CSR# 5162. (212)
